checked_dimensions.name: spec_compliance
checked_dimensions.evidence: Issue #262 authorized v3 CI action pinning, dependency-free operation-plan validation, v3 tests, v3 push and CI, branch protection attempt or exact blocker evidence, and v1 evidence artifacts. The final report and evidence files record those outcomes.

checked_dimensions.name: acceptance_criteria
checked_dimensions.evidence: The workflow is SHA-pinned, operation-plan validation is implemented without operation execution, positive and negative operation-plan tests pass, readiness docs were updated, v3 local tests pass, v3 commit 8f9555aef6672580e202c082c0e998cd9a71911d was pushed, v3 CI run 28218116898 passed, and branch protection blocker evidence was recorded.

checked_dimensions.name: policy_boundaries
checked_dimensions.evidence: The work stayed inside declared v1 evidence artifacts and the authorized v3 repository. It did not touch secrets, dependencies, production, billing, auth, authorization, databases, deployment automation, hosted runtime, external providers, mutation MCP, public visibility, force push, branch deletion, remote deletion, v1 policy, v1 main merge, or operation-plan execution.

checked_dimensions.name: security_rules
checked_dimensions.evidence: No credentials, private keys, production settings, auth, billing, database, deployment, or destructive infrastructure were touched. The CI workflow remains read-only and the checkout action is pinned to a full commit SHA.

checked_dimensions.name: changed_file_scope
checked_dimensions.evidence: All v1 evidence files are declared in the issue #262 scope manifest. The v3 changed files are inside D:\Antigravity\Infinite Process\specbridge-v3, which is explicitly allowed by the contract.

checked_dimensions.name: test_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: SpecBridge v3 local tests passed with 178 bootstrap assertions, 24 minimalism-review assertions, and 32 operation-plan assertions. The direct validator with the real operation plan also passed.

checked_dimensions.name: ci_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: GitHub Actions run 28218116898 for v3 workflow CI completed successfully on 8f9555aef6672580e202c082c0e998cd9a71911d.

checked_dimensions.name: branch_protection
checked_dimensions.evidence: Branch protection read and write attempts both returned HTTP 403: Upgrade to GitHub Pro or make this repository public to enable this feature. The contract blocks public visibility changes, so the remaining action is an external account or visibility decision.

checked_dimensions.name: final_report_honesty
checked_dimensions.evidence: The final report records the implemented v3 hardening, local tests, direct validator, pushed commit, CI success, exact branch-protection blocker, policy boundaries, merge status, deployment status, unresolved risks, and rollback path.

findings.evidence: Branch protection could not be applied to private specbridge-v3 master because GitHub returned HTTP 403 requiring GitHub Pro or public visibility.
findings.recommendation: Enable GitHub Pro for private branch protection or authorize a future governed visibility decision; do not change visibility under this contract.

findings.evidence: The v1 evidence branch has not been opened or merged into main under a PR, CI, review, and explicit operator merge gate.
findings.recommendation: Open or update the v1 evidence PR and merge only after required gates pass and operator merge authority is explicit.

findings.evidence: GitHub emitted a non-failing annotation that the pinned checkout action targets Node.js 20 and is being forced to run on Node.js 24.
findings.recommendation: Consider a later CI hardening contract to pin a newer checkout major version when appropriate.

unresolved_risks: V1 evidence is not merged into main.
specbridge-v3 master is not branch-protected due GitHub account or plan limitation on private repositories.
The pinned checkout action emitted a non-failing Node.js 20 deprecation annotation.
V3 operation execution and sandboxing remain future scope.
